content: MSP outage alert: Zoom Chat degradation affecting a subset of North America users

text.text:
*Current Issue*
Zoom reports an identified service degradation affecting a subset of users with Zoom Chat in the North America region. The issue remains unresolved as of the latest vendor update.

*Why You Care*
Client chats, internal coordination, and support escalations that rely on Zoom Chat may be delayed or fail intermittently, generating user confusion and avoidable helpdesk noise.

fields.text:
*Status*
Identified — vendor says engineering is actively working on a resolution.

*Impact*
North America subset; chat workflows degraded, while broader Zoom services are not indicated as down in the current incident notice.

text.text:
*Response*
• Advise affected users to shift urgent conversations to Teams, email, SMS, or phone until chat behavior stabilizes.
• Watch for client reports tied specifically to Zoom Chat in North America and avoid treating this as a full Zoom platform outage.
